title: vallariopsis lancifolia
intro: Vallariopsis lancifolia, also known as the "Garden Valerian", is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, which are attributed to its high concentration of valepotriates and valerenic acid. The health benefits of Vallariopsis lancifolia include reduced stress and anxiety levels, improved sleep quality, and a calming effect on the nervous system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and its roots are also used in traditional medicine to treat insomnia and restlessness.
